PLAINTIFFS 201 TURK STREET ARE GIVEN RESTITUTION OF 201 TURK STREET, #308, SAN FRANCISCO. POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS STAYED THROUGH MIDNIGHT 10-3-94. IF DEFENDANTS, JAMES TYLER AND CHARLETTA SIMPSON HAVE VACATED THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE THAT DATE, PLAINTIFFS, 201 TURK STREET WILL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS WILL BE ALLOWED TO SHOW APARTMENT TO POTENTIAL RENTERS BY NOTIFYING TENANTS WITH A TELEPHONE CALL FIFTEEN MINUTES AHEAD OF TIME. THE LEASE IN THIS MATTER IS
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT TYLER, JAMES SIMPSON, CHARLETTA HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
